title: More Useful Tables
description:
Available in CurseForge and Modrinth.
This mod add a new equipment, blocks, and more.
(Available Only to Version 1.21.1 & 1.21.5 Neoforge) 
(Recomended Resource pack: Luminous Core UI for M. U. T. [Only v3.0.0 Beta 2+])
body:
**This Mod will no longer be updated, and have been Archived. Until further notice**

[Available on Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-useful-tables)
<details>
<summary>What's The Mod Contains</summary>

Thee mod contains a various of blocks, Items, & More. As of now. 
(Prior to v1.0.0 - v2.0.0):
- Toolsmith Table, 
- Variants of Toolsmith Template, 
- Mjölnir, 
- Spears, 
- Structures, 
- Mystical and Magic wood set,
- Magic Table, 
- More.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Important Info:</summary>
  
  - No Longer Support JEI on v3.0.0 Pre-Release 2 and onwards, instead have a recipe tab on the Workbenches
  - Full Release for v3.0.0 will be released on 14 December
  
</details>

This is one of the Music Disc from More Useful Tables:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5Qn-W4gBdLM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Welcome to More Useful Tables this mod, add custom useful Workbenches that can be useful for any one out there who want the expansion of the Workbenches, the Workbenches here is like Smithing Table that can upgrade or trims armor. All Workbenches have a function on it's own. each Update will contain a block that is functional and used for a purpose. The first update Tool Update have a block called Toolsmith Table that is use to create weapon and also needed toolsmith template for it. but there is no recipe book that u can see. If u want to know the recipe u need to install JEI, but only acessable in (1.21.1 only for now) might be change later. 

For the reason to making this mod, is to expand the Workbenches family and also have a unique function.
